blueprint.name: BNK demo on native k3s (ocibnkctl)
blueprint.description: Deploy F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes 2.3.1 in demo mode on a k3s cluster running as containers on the host docker/podman runtime — no cloud account, no DPU. Runs entirely through the ocibnkctl tools-runner image and the BNK Forge docker-socket proxy.

outcomes: A native k3s cluster (server + TMM worker) running as containers on the deployment host
F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes 2.3.1 deployed in demo mode (FLO, cert-manager, CNE/TMM)
Resume-safe, idempotent pipeline — re-running apply continues where it left off

prerequisites.name: F5 FAR tarball
prerequisites.description: Image-pull credentials for repo.f5.com — drop into /state/poc/keys/ in the module state after init, before deploy.

prerequisites.name: TEEM JWT
prerequisites.description: Activation token — drop into /state/poc/keys/.jwt in the module state after init, before deploy.

prerequisites.name: Docker socket proxy
prerequisites.description: BNK Forge docker-socket proxy with container create/exec capabilities (ships with server installs).

prerequisites.name: Host resources
prerequisites.description: ~10 CPU cores recommended on the deployment host; the pipeline auto-shrinks on tighter hosts.

modules.name: ocibnkctl tools runner
modules.description: Runs ocibnkctl init/validate/e2e inside the pinned tools-runner image; k3s nodes launch as sibling containers via the docker-socket proxy.

required.name: poc_name
required.label: PoC / cluster name
required.description: Names the PoC repo, the k3s cluster and its node containers. Give parallel PoCs on one host distinct names.

optional.name: provider
optional.label: Container runtime
optional.description: Host runtime the k3s nodes run as containers on.

optional.name: tmm_nodes
optional.label: TMM nodes
optional.description: Worker nodes dedicated to TMM — one active TMM pod each. Each TMM serves traffic landing on its own node (no cross-node fan-out in demo mode).

optional.name: edge_octet
optional.label: Edge network octet
optional.description: 3rd octet of this PoC's bnk-edge network (192.168.<n>.0/24). Must be distinct per cluster or parallel PoCs collide on the same docker subnet.

optional.name: host_profile
optional.label: Host profile
optional.description: Leave unset for auto-detect (picks 'small' below the 10-core floor, shedding TMM's metrics sidecar). Choose explicitly only to override that.

optional.name: teems_relay
optional.label: TEEMS egress relay
optional.description: Enable only on hosts where forwarded pod egress is lossy and licensing (TEEMS) fails as a result.

optional.name: customer
optional.label: Customer name
optional.description: Optional label recorded in the PoC repo's poc.yaml metadata. Cosmetic.
